options.no: Nid wyf angen help i dalu’r ffi

hasSupportingDocuments.changeHint: cyChange whether you want to upload documents to support your application

statementOfTruth.theInformationFormsYourApplication: cyThe information on this page forms your application.
statementOfTruth.whenYouAreSatisfied: cyWhen you’re satisfied that your answers are correct, you should tick the box below and write your name to “sign” this statement of truth.

checkbox.value: cyI believe that the facts stated in this form are true.

statementOfTruth.understandProceedings: Deallaf y gellir dwyn achos dirmyg llys yn erbyn unrhyw un sy’n gwneud datganiad anwir, neu sy’n achosi i ddatganiad anwir gael ei wneud mewn dogfen a ddilysir gan ddatganiad gwirionedd heb gredu'n onest ei fod yn wir.

errors.agreeToTheStatementOfTruth: cyAgree to the statement of truth
errors.fullNameMaxLength: cyYour full name must be 100 characters or fewer
